mnemonics: SMART Goals: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound
keyPoints: Objectives provide clear direction and measurable targets for the project.
They align the project's outcomes with broader business goals and strategy.
Well-defined objectives are crucial for managing stakeholder expectations and measuring success.
commonMistakes: Setting vague or unquantifiable objectives (e.g., 'make it better').
Focusing solely on product features without considering business value or constraints.
